# grantory_host (Data Source)
Use this data source to filter Grantory records inside a Terraform/OpenTofu plan.


## Schema

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) Identifier of the host to fetch.

### Optional

- `labels` (Map of String) Labels attached to the host.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `unique_key` (String) Unique key used to enforce host uniqueness within a namespace.
